name: complex::nested_ternary::ref::direct
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { ready.value ? (enabled.value ? payload.value : sink()) : sink(); });
